name: @aqa/kit
description: agentic-qa-kit — `aqa` CLI for the multi-agent QA operating system. Multi-agent (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Copilot), Bun-first, enterprise-ready.
author: Padosoft <info@padosoft.com>

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/bundle-packs.mjs && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --test test/cli.test.ts test/profiler.test.ts test/run-cmd.test.ts test/pack-new.test.ts test/build-bundle.test.ts
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const p of ['dist','.tsbuildinfo']) { try { rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch {} }"
